title: OGP (Offline & Online Guidance Foundation Program) for UPSC CSE 2027 – Batch 4 Orientation Session | Free Session by Vinay Sir (April 27)
description: OGP Batch 4 Orientation Session for UPSC 2027 Insights IAS invites all serious UPSC aspirants to the OGP Orientation Session for UPSC 2027 – Batch 4, conducted by Vinay Kumar G.B. (Vinay Sir), Founder & Director, Insights IAS. Aspirants can attend the session offline in Bengaluru or watch it live for free on YouTube.
